title: Simply Dual Wielding
description: If your main hand can do it, so can your offhand! No fancy animations, though.
body:
# THIS WILL BE UPDATED TO 26.1 EVENTUALLY!
## I'm going to be deriving it from Ambidexterity again because this has kind of been left behind and I don't have a desire to properly bring it into alignment with Ambi and make all the same changes again.
## It'll take a bit for me to get to this, though, as I am in exam season.

Allows offhand attack actions with any item! Does not break vanilla behavior in any circumstances I have tested. _please_ report it if you find any situations where it does. I want to avoid that.

There are _no_ fancy animations whatsoever.

Also check out [Ambidexterity](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambi) if you want an experience with more significant changes!

**CONFIGURATION:**
Currently, the server's configuration is sent to all clients, and it will override the client's options. However, if the 'allow weak config' setting is 'true' for that slot, then both the client and the server have to allow for an item to be used in a specific way in order for it to be allowed. If it is set to false, then the player's setting is ignored and overridden.

**INSTRUCTIONS ON ALLOWING FREE CLIENT CONFIG:**
Set the 'weak config' option to true for a given slot.
Then if the option you want free config for is the 'empty hand' option, set that to true.
For both attacks and mining, set those to 'all.'

_PLEASE_ let me know if there are any issues with the config! I've worked really hard on it.


**A NOTE:** In order to have the full, intended experience with offhand mining functionality, Right Click Fixer is essential! However, it should be noted that this is not the ONLY way to experience this mod; it is simply how I wanted it to be experienced. This is up to you.

**NOTE 2:** Offhand Mining is _not_ available in creative mode.

Feel free to include this in modpacks; but please link back [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-dual-wielding).

Mod basis credit to [Globox1997](https://modrinth.com/user/Globox1997) for [DualWielding](https://modrinth.com/mod/dualwielding); however, since forking, however, I have added AND removed more lines of code to this than he ever did. Still, check it out if you want to play on 1.19.2 or 1.20.

**NOTE:** versions prior to 1.21 are on a subsistence update schedule, meaning that I will only update them for major feature additions or for bugs. Minor feature additions and changes will be done along with the next major update or bugfix.
